SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CINDY RYAN--STORE MGR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
